headline: Branding Strategy
description: A brand is more than a logo — it's the sum of perceptions, emotions, and associations customers have. Strong brands command premium pricing, customer loyalty, and competitive moats. Brand equity (Aaker): brand awareness, perceived quality, brand associations, brand loyalty. Apple, Nike, Coca-Cola are among the world's most valuable brands.

citation.name: Building a StoryBrand: Clarify Your Message (2025 Updated)
citation.author: Miller D.

citation.name: Brand Management: A Strategic Approach (2025 Edition)
citation.author: multiple
